title: eragrostis suaveolens subsp. borysthenica
intro: Eragrostis suaveolens subsp. borysthenica is a subspecies of the Eragrostis suaveolens grass, commonly found in Eastern Europe, particularly in Ukraine and Russia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis suaveolens subsp. borysthenica include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Eragrostis suaveolens subsp. borysthenica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
